translation.homeSubtitle: Smart and private synchronization of Hebrew events to your Google Calendar.
translation.landingHeroTitle: Hebrew dates that stay in sync with your calendar
translation.landingHeroBody: HebSync helps you manage birthdays, memorial dates, anniversaries, and recurring Hebrew events without recalculating them every year. Choose a calendar, import or create events, and review everything before it is written.
translation.landingValueSyncTitle: Hebrew dates that stay in sync
translation.landingValueSyncBody: Birthdays, anniversaries, memorial dates, and custom Hebrew events continue appearing in your calendar years ahead.
translation.landingValueImportBody: Upload a workbook, review the parsed rows, and confirm only after you see exactly what will be created.
translation.landingValueControlBody: Start with safer access, choose whether to work only in HebSync calendars or in existing calendars too, and upgrade editing only when needed.
translation.landingHowItWorksTitle: A short, safe setup and then the calendar becomes the center
translation.landingHowItWorksBody: On your first visit, choose how HebSync should connect to your calendars. From there, day-to-day work happens in the calendar view: browsing, creating, importing, and updating recurring events in one place.
translation.landingChecklistOneBody: Understand how the app works, install it, and choose the access model that fits you before getting started.
translation.landingChecklistTwoBody: After the initial connection, you move into the calendar screen, where the regular workflow happens without needing to return here all the time.
translation.landingConnectTitle: Choose how HebSync should connect to your calendars
translation.landingConnectBody: Start with HebSync-only calendars or connect existing calendars too. Editing access is requested only when you actually need to make a change.
translation.appInstalled: HebSync is installed on this device.
translation.selectAccess: Choose how HebSync should work with your calendars.
translation.maxPrivacyDesc: Use only calendars created by HebSync. A simple way to keep everything separate.
translation.readOnlyDesc: Connect HebSync to your existing calendars too. We'll start with view access and ask for editing only when needed.
translation.fullAccessDesc: HebSync can create, update, and delete events in your selected calendars.
translation.orSelectOther: Need a different setup? You can reconnect with another option.
translation.thanksTo: Thanks to the open source community and the Hebcal library for the computational engine
translation.aboutHebSyncHint: What the app does, how it works, and the initial connection setup.
translation.bulkImportAccessHint: Open Excel import from the Add Event flow, under the import tab.
translation.newCalendarPrompt: Enter a name for the new calendar:
translation.revokeAccessConfirm: This action will disconnect the app from your Google account and revoke all permissions you granted it. Continue?
translation.deleteEventConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event (and all of its occurrences) from the calendar?
translation.bulkImportBody: Download the Excel template, fill the Events sheet, and later upload it here for preview and import.
translation.bulkImportEventsSheetOnly: HebSync will read only the first sheet, Events. The extra sheets are helper lists in the workbook and are not imported as event data.
translation.bulkImportCalendarsHint: The Excel file does not contain calendar mapping. One import applies to the same selected calendar set, with one or more calendars chosen below.
translation.bulkImportFlowStep1: Download the template and fill only the Events sheet.
translation.bulkImportFlowStep2: Choose one or more target calendars once for the whole file.
translation.bulkImportFlowStep3: Upload the completed workbook, review the parsed events, and confirm before anything is created.
translation.bulkImportRowNeedsDecision: Choose how to handle this special date
translation.bulkImportFallback29: Move to the 29th of the same month
translation.bulkImportFallback1st: Delay to the 1st of the next month
translation.bulkImportConfirmHint: All rows are ready to import.
translation.bulkImportConfirmHintCalendars: Choose at least one calendar before importing.
translation.bulkImportConfirmHintDecision: Choose handling for each special date before importing.
translation.addEventSubtitle: Enter a single event or upload a bulk file
translation.checkUpcomingDates: Check the upcoming dates for this event
translation.reloginForEdit: We'll ask for editing permission when you choose to make changes.
translation.permissionScreenSubtitle: Choose how HebSync should work with your calendars.
translation.permissionModalBody: Choose how you want HebSync to work with your calendars. You can change this later.
translation.permissionReconnectBody: Your Google connection expired. Choose how HebSync should reconnect and continue working with your calendars.
translation.permissionUpgradeBody: You're about to create, update, or delete events. HebSync needs event-editing permission to make those changes on your behalf.
translation.permissionUpgradeCardBody: We'll keep your current setup and ask Google only for the extra permission needed to create, edit, or delete events in calendars you choose to manage.
translation.permissionUpgradeTrust: This does not grant broad calendar management like deleting your other calendars.
translation.permissionHebsyncOnlyDesc: Use only calendars created by HebSync. A simple way to keep everything separate.
translation.permissionHebsyncOnlyFooter: Best if you want HebSync activity separate from your personal and work calendars.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsDesc: Use HebSync with your existing calendars too, so you can manage events in one place.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsHelper: View access first. Editing permission only when needed.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsFooter: You'll first allow HebSync to view your calendars. If you later create, edit, or delete events, we'll ask for event-editing permission before making changes.
translation.permissionInfoBody: HebSync can either work in its own dedicated calendars or connect to your existing ones. If you choose existing calendars, we first ask to view them so you can choose what HebSync should use.
translation.permissionInfoTrustBody: Editing permission is requested only when you choose an action like creating, updating, or deleting an event, not for broad calendar management.
translation.editingEnabledStatus: Editing enabled for your selected calendars.
translation.viewingOnlyStatus: Viewing calendars now. We'll ask before HebSync makes changes.
translation.hebSyncOnlyStatus: HebSync only works with calendars it created.
translation.switchToReadOnlyConfirm: To go back to view-only access, we'll disconnect and reconnect your Google account without event-editing permission. Continue?
translation.switchToHebsyncOnlyConfirm: To switch back to HebSync calendars only, we'll disconnect and reconnect your Google account with the safer access level. Continue?
translation.discardEventConfirm: Are you sure you want to close? Your unsaved event details may be lost.
translation.errorNoCalendar: Please select at least one calendar to sync
translation.leapYearNote: Leap year - moved to Adar II
